creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Thu Jan  3 11:35:28 2013
New Revision: 309867
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309867

Log:
  - update to 1.2.2
  
  PR:		174921
  Submitted by:	Gasol Wu <gasol.wu@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/pear-PHPUnit_MockObject/Makefile
  head/devel/pear-PHPUnit_MockObject/distinfo
  head/devel/pear-PHPUnit_MockObject/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/pear-PHPUnit_MockObject/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/pear-PHPUnit_MockObject/Makefile	Thu Jan  3 11:30:50 2013	(r309866)
+++ head/devel/pear-PHPUnit_MockObject/Makefile	Thu Jan  3 11:35:28 2013	(r309867)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	PHPUnit_MockObject
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel pear
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pear.phpunit.de/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pear-
@@ -22,9 +22,6 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	pear>=1.9.4:${PORTSDIR}/dev
 PEAR_CHANNEL=	phpunit
 PEAR_AUTOINSTALL=	yes
 
-DEFAULT_PHP_VER=5
-IGNORE_WITH_PHP=4
-
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 .include "${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear/bsd.pear.mk"
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

+SHA256 (PEAR/PHPUnit_MockObject-1.2.2.tgz) = 79cf716da2fee75230b76081a20df013705884ad327c0e3d653f95d065849a47
+SIZE (PEAR/PHPUnit_MockObject-1.2.2.tgz) = 20347
